name: Mounds of Bugs
recipeIngredient: (not jimmies, Hershey's Chocolate Shoppe used in photo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a skewer, poke 3 holes into each long side of the Mounds bars.
2. Insert grape Pull-n-Peel candy as the bug's legs.
3. Spoon frosting into a pastry bag with a small plain tip or a small zipper-lock bag with a corner snipped.
4. Pipe 2 small dots on one short end of the candy bar and attach the Reese's Pieces as the eyes.
5. Pipe dots on top of the candy eyes and on the body.
6. Press Chocolate Shoppe pieces onto the frosting dots on the body.
7. Makes 24 party favors. This recipe is from Hershey's.
